description:
Edge Stackers offers a unique opportunity to join a rapidly expanding investment and technology company with a verified, robust and profitable track record ready for scale.



We are seeking ambitious, competitive Data Engineers to join this expansion.

Successful candidates will be given the opportunity to share in the spoils of superior performance alongside the psychological comfort that comes with joining a profitable business about to scale and hit an inflection point.

Our standards are to out-think and out-work the rest. Your challenge will be to uncover innovative solutions enabling our team to capitalise on opportunities ahead of competitors.

The successful candidate will relish the challenge of attacking projects few can successfully complete, working as part of an experienced, best in class, close-knit team.

We are fast-paced; the faster we iterate, the faster we can innovate.

You will be a valued team member, making a meaningful contribution to the company strategy. You will be extended autonomy, designing, expanding, and optimising our data and data pipeline architecture, and optimising data flow into our predictive models.

You will have the freedom to drive tasks with suitable technology. We are keen to leverage new and exciting tools to give us an edge over our competitors.

There will be opportunities to shape the role to how you work best. Loyalty and humility are non-negotiable requirements.

The Stack

Python, Rust, javascript, SQL, Prefect, AWS, Buildkite, Docker

Experience with this stack is not essential if you have comparable skills.

2+ years of work experience, with a minimum Bachelors Degree Qualification in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering or equivalent.

If you are an experienced programmer interested in leaping to the Data Engineering world or are currently a Data Engineer looking for an exciting new opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

There is no better time to join our expansion and share in the spoils of superior performance, alongside the psychological safety of a 20-year proven and profitable track record.

recruitment@edgestackers.com
